name: auto-cli
description: Auto CLI - Claude Code 超级开发辅助工具

scripts.sync: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const os=require('os'); const path=require('path'); const src='commands'; const dest=path.join('.claude','commands'); const globalDest=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude','commands'); const managed=['auto.md',path.join('auto','create-hook.md'),path.join('auto','doctor.md'),path.join('auto','learn.md'),path.join('auto','route.md'),path.join('auto','status.md')]; const legacyNamespace=[path.join('auto','auto.md'),path.join('auto','auto')]; const legacyAliases=[['create-hook.md',path.join('auto','create-hook.md')],['doctor.md',path.join('auto','doctor.md')],['learn.md',path.join('auto','learn.md')],['status.md',path.join('auto','status.md')]]; const normalize=(content)=>content.replace(/\r\n/g,'\n').trimEnd(); const isFile=(filePath)=>fs.existsSync(filePath)&&fs.statSync(filePath).isFile(); const remove=(targetPath)=>fs.rmSync(targetPath,{recursive:true,force:true}); const prune=(dir)=>{ if(fs.existsSync(dir) && fs.statSync(dir).isDirectory() && fs.readdirSync(dir).length===0){ remove(dir); } }; const clearMatchingAliases=(root)=>{ for(const [legacyRelative,canonicalRelative] of legacyAliases){ const legacyPath=path.join(root,legacyRelative); const canonicalPath=path.join(src,canonicalRelative); if(!isFile(legacyPath) || !isFile(canonicalPath)) continue; const legacyContent=fs.readFileSync(legacyPath,'utf8'); const canonicalContent=fs.readFileSync(canonicalPath,'utf8'); if(normalize(legacyContent)===normalize(canonicalContent)){ remove(legacyPath); } } }; const globalMatchesCurrentRepo=managed.every((relativePath)=>{ const sourcePath=path.join(src,relativePath); const globalPath=path.join(globalDest,relativePath); if(!isFile(sourcePath) || !isFile(globalPath)) return false; return normalize(fs.readFileSync(sourcePath,'utf8'))===normalize(fs.readFileSync(globalPath,'utf8')); }); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest),{recursive:true}); for(const relativePath of legacyNamespace){ remove(path.join(dest,relativePath)); } clearMatchingAliases(dest); if(globalMatchesCurrentRepo){ for(const relativePath of managed){ remove(path.join(dest,relativePath)); } prune(path.join(dest,'auto')); console.log('Skipped local sync: global ~/.claude/commands already matches current repo.'); process.exit(0); } fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true}); console.log('Synced commands/ -> .claude/commands/');"

author: Auto CLI Team
